name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: Behavioral coding guidelines inspired by Andrej Karpathy's observations on common LLM coding pitfalls.

interface.shortDescription: Coding-agent guidelines for simpler, more deliberate code changes.
interface.longDescription: Use Karpathy Guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes: surface assumptions, prefer simple solutions, keep edits surgical, and define verifiable success criteria before implementation.
defaultPrompt: Use Karpathy Guidelines while implementing this change.
Review this diff for overcomplication and unrelated edits.
Turn this task into verifiable success criteria.
